old_string:
module Uart_tx_fifo (
    input  logic        clk,        // Clock (PCLK)
    input  logic        rst_n,      // Async reset, active-low (PRESETn)
    input  logic [7:0]  wr_data,    // Write data (PWDATA)
    input  logic        wr_en,      // Write enable (tx_fifo_push)
    input  logic        rd_en,      // Read enable (tx_fifo_pop from FSM)
    output logic [7:0]  rd_data,    // Read data (combinational, Read-Through)
    output logic        full,       // FIFO full flag
    output logic        empty,      // FIFO empty flag
    output logic [4:0]  count       // Data count (0-16)
);

    // Storage array: 16 entries, 8-bit wide
    logic [7:0] data_fifo [15:0];

    // Pointers and counter
    logic [3:0] ip_count;   // Write pointer (0-15)
    logic [3:0] op_count;   // Read pointer (0-15)
    logic [4:0] cnt;        // Data counter (0-16)
new_string:
module Uart_tx_fifo (
    input              clk,        // Clock (PCLK)
    input              rst_n,      // Async reset, active-low (PRESETn)
    input      [7:0]   wr_data,    // Write data (PWDATA)
    input              wr_en,      // Write enable (tx_fifo_push)
    input              rd_en,      // Read enable (tx_fifo_pop from FSM)
    output     [7:0]   rd_data,    // Read data (combinational, Read-Through)
    output             full,       // FIFO full flag
    output             empty,      // FIFO empty flag
    output     [4:0]   count       // Data count (0-16)
);

    // Storage array: 16 entries, 8-bit wide
    reg [7:0] data_fifo [15:0];

    // Pointers and counter
    reg [3:0] ip_count;   // Write pointer (0-15)
    reg [3:0] op_count;   // Read pointer (0-15)
    reg [4:0] cnt;        // Data counter (0-16)
